# Amplitude Sweep

**Summary**: A dynamic test used to determine the linear viscoelastic region (LVE) of a fluid.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-basfar|BASFAR, 2018]] used amplitude sweep tests to identify the LVE and evaluate structural properties.
